summary.position: The harness has deterministic proof for scaffold, evaluation, and contract integrity, plus a real workflow E2E definition. It is not yet fully proven until the live real workflow E2E and multi-agent delegation proof are executed and gated.

greenfield_scaffold.rationale: The scaffold command has fast contract tests for generated harness structure, manifest field alignment, and adversarial greenfield prompts.

brownfield_adaptation.rationale: Brownfield guidance, fixture coverage, adversarial preservation contracts, and a live mutation E2E are defined, but the live adversarial mutation run has not yet been executed in this session.

real_workflow_e2e.rationale: The real workflow E2E is defined and guarded against bypass prompts, but the live E2E must be executed before this can be marked proven.

phase_evaluation.rationale: Phase evaluation has unit, telemetry integration, and manifest contract coverage.

end_user_usability.rationale: The harness has install and framework smoke coverage, but it still needs a fresh-user usability script that proves setup from a clean checkout.

multi_agent_claims.rationale: The delegation CONTRACT is now deterministically proven: agent-teams execution is enabled, the generator declares the Agent tool and mandates one teammate per story with logged spawn evidence, review handoff (no self-evaluation) and GAN separation (evaluator never generates) are declared, and /auto delegates generation and verification to distinct agents. Live delegated execution and failure recovery still require the model-gated e2e, so this remains partially_proven.
